title: Pickaxe Ability Notification for Hypixel Skyblock
description: This mod adds an on-screen message whenever the mining pickaxe ability is available so you don't forget to use it
body:
# 🎮 Pickaxe Ability Notification - Never Miss Your Mining Abilities Again!

**Pickaxe Ability Notification** is a must-have Minecraft mod for players who want to maximize their mining efficiency. If you've ever missed when your special pickaxe abilities became available while you're focused on mining, this mod is for you!

## 🌟 What Does This Mod Do?

This mod keeps track of your pickaxe's special mining abilities and alerts you the moment they're ready to use again. No more guessing or constantly checking – you'll know instantly when powerful abilities like **Pickobulus**, **Maniac Miner**, **Sheer Force**, and others are available. 

## 🎯 Key Features

### 📢 **Instant Visual Alerts**
When your mining ability is ready, a large, eye-catching title appears on your screen. You won't miss it even in the heat of mining!

### 🔔 **Sound Notifications**
Hear a pleasant note block "pling" sound whenever an ability becomes available. Perfect if you're looking away from the center of your screen.  

### 🎨 **Personalize Your Experience**
Choose from **16 different colors** for your notifications!  Whether you prefer the default gold, vibrant red, cool aqua, or any other Minecraft color – make it yours.  Available colors include:
- Black, Dark Blue, Dark Green, Dark Aqua
- Dark Red, Dark Purple, **Gold (default)**
- Gray, Dark Gray, Blue, Green
- Aqua, Red, Light Purple, Yellow, White

### ⚡ **Toggle Anytime**
Don't want notifications during a specific mining session?  Easily turn them on or off with a simple command.

### 💾 **Remembers Your Preferences**
Your color choice and notification settings are automatically saved and will be there next time you play – no need to reconfigure every session!

## 🔧 How to Use It

### Simple Commands

**Turn notifications on or off:**
```
/panotification enabled
/panotification disabled
```

**Change the notification color:**
```
/panotification color <color name>
```

For example:  `/panotification color aqua` or `/panotification color light_purple`

That's it! The mod handles everything else automatically. 

## 💡 Why Use This Mod?

- **Maximize Efficiency**: Use your abilities the moment they're ready
- **Stay Focused**:  No need to constantly check your ability status
- **Better Mining Sessions**:  Spend more time mining, less time managing cooldowns
- **Customizable**:  Make it look exactly how you want
- **Lightweight**:  Won't slow down your game

---
